disclaimer.paragraph1: Yield is optional and based on crypto/DeFi (Ether.fi). There is no capital guarantee.

q1.title: How do I add funds to my account?
q1.answer: Go to Dashboard and click “Deposit”. We support card (Stripe) and bank transfer, depending on availability.

q2.title: How long does a transfer take?
q2.answer: Account-to-account transfers are instant. Virtual card sends are also immediate.

q3.title: What is KYC level?
q3.answer: It is your identity verification level. Higher levels unlock higher sending limits.

q4.title: Does my virtual card work in Brazil?
q4.answer: Yes. Cards are issued in EUR/USD and work globally. FX conversion happens at purchase time.

Status.title: Review in progress
Status.description:
We received your details and documents. Our compliance team is reviewing your information.

This usually takes a few minutes, but it can take up to 24 hours. You'll receive an email once your account is activated.

Security.title: Security
Security.description: Manage your password and authentication settings.
Security.authDesc: Update your password and secure your account.
Security.twoFactorAuthDescription: Add an extra layer of security via SMS verification.
Security.yieldToggleLabel: Use Ether.fi yield to increase my buying power (beta)
Security.yieldToggleDescription: By enabling this option, you authorize GSS to consider yield and crypto collateral (e.g., eETH in Ether.fi) to temporarily increase your fiat buying power for card and payments. Yield is not guaranteed and asset values may fluctuate. Turning this off affects new spends only; existing yield-based debts remain valid until fully settled.

Limits.title: Your KYC, risk and limits
Limits.subtitle: Understand what you can do today and how to increase your limits.

kycNextStep.premium: You're already at the maximum KYC level.
kycNextStep.generic: Complete additional steps to increase your limits.

riskExplanation.low: Conservative profile: typical limits and fewer reviews.
riskExplanation.medium: Moderate profile: limits may be adjusted based on usage and history.
riskExplanation.high: High-risk profile: reduced limits and more checks.
riskExplanation.generic: Limits may vary based on your profile.

Limits.riskNote: Risk tier influences limits, reviews and additional requirements.
Limits.limitsDesc: Values applied to your current profile.

WalletDeposit.pixHint: In production, this generates a QR code. For tests, funds are credited automatically.
WalletDeposit.pixSuccessDesc: We received your PIX payment of R$ {amount}.

bank.successDescription: We received your details. Funds will be credited within 24–48 business hours after bank settlement.

bankHowTo.title: How to deposit via bank transfer?

steps.2: Copy the provided bank details (IBAN and BIC/SWIFT).
steps.3: Open your banking app and start an international transfer (SEPA or SWIFT).
steps.4: Important: include the reference code in the “Description” field.
steps.5: After sending, save the proof (PDF or image).
steps.6: Come back and upload the proof in step 2.

bankHowTo.deadline: ETA: 1–3 business days after proof submission.
